reviews.review_description: I have only played this game once, and all I have to say is that it is ABSOLUTELY AMAZING. there may not be combat or that many options for gameplay, but I have to say, this game ABSOLUTELY NAILS EVERY SINGLE ASPECT IT HAS. the building is SO good, the grappling and the boost, the CROSSHAIRS?! EVERYTHING ABOUT HIS GAME IS JUST. SO. GOOD. if this game ever gets updated, hell, even if it costs money, I will NOT hesitate to buy it. Absolutely INCREDIBLE job, one of my favourite games yet.

I rarely write reviews for anything but this is a great game with lots of potential my only gripe is the building being kinda tedious. You can’t scale or copy blocks and it’s kinda sensitive and as someone with naturally shaky hands it makes blocks harder to place properly. Outside of that great game to pick up and play will get the full game when it drops
Came here from spider Dorian’s video and all I have to say is ah ay ay ay th shame is great
This game surprised me. It first looks like a cheap VR game then I realised it had more to it and it’s pretty fun.
